style: mythic Chinese fantasy, painterly game sprite, red-gold-black palette with moon-blue accents
currentImplementation: AutoSprite-generated character sheets are integrated for the player, all four enemies, and the boss. Tiles, backgrounds, and UI remain procedural (code-drawn).
generatedBy: AutoSprite MCP (autosprite.io). Characters created + animated via generate_spritesheet; sheets are 8 frames in a 3-column grid.
loader: src/spritedata.ts registers every sheet into the SpriteBank (src/sprites.ts). Entities fall back to procedural art until a sheet's Image finishes loading.
regenerate: In a session with AutoSprite MCP connected, re-run generate_spritesheet for a character and overwrite the PNG under assets/sprites/<name>/.
